description: Sharperflow org-wide Renovate preset. Repos extend via: { "extends": ["github>Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates"] }

packageRules.description: Cooldown cannot be validated for PM-driven update types

Major updates require Dependency Dashboard approval. Breaking majors (e.g. python 3.x, framework majors) never auto-merge and would otherwise re-run the full CI suite on every rebase forever. Gate them behind an explicit human opt-in in the dashboard so they create no PR/CI churn until someone commits to the migration. Minor/patch/digest updates still flow hands-off.
